title: Settings
custom_instructions_description: Tell the AI how to behave. For example: "Always reply in French" or "Explain things simply".
custom_instructions_placeholder: e.g. You are a friendly assistant who explains things simply...
creativity_description: Lower values give more predictable, focused answers. Higher values make responses more creative and varied.
response_length_description: Maximum length of each response. Higher values allow longer answers but take more time to generate.
top_p_description: Limits the pool of words the AI picks from. Lower values keep it more focused.
top_k_description: Only considers the top K most likely next words. Lower = more predictable.
min_p_description: Filters out words that are too unlikely. Higher values make output more predictable.
repeat_penalty_description: Discourages the AI from repeating itself. Higher values = less repetition.
repeat_last_n_description: How far back the AI checks for repeated words.
frequency_penalty_description: Reduces how often common words appear. Useful for more varied language.
presence_penalty_description: Encourages the AI to talk about new topics rather than repeating old ones.
seed_description: Set a number for reproducible results. Leave at -1 for random.
stop_sequences_description: Words or phrases that tell the AI to stop generating. Separate with commas.
your_models_description: Models you have downloaded. You can switch between them at any time.
no_models_downloaded: No models downloaded yet. Add one below to get started.
add_model_description: Download a new model or load your own GGUF file.
your_data_description: Export your conversations as text files for safekeeping.
danger_zone_description: This will permanently delete all conversations, models, and settings.
confirm_delete_all: This will delete all conversations, cached models, and settings. This cannot be undone.
